## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Testing done
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Manually tested on dev environment
- [ ] Smoke test against dev URL passes
- [ ] No regressions in related features

## Security checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Input validation added for any new user-facing fields
- [ ] Key Vault used for new secrets (not app settings directly)
- [ ] Dependencies audited (`npm audit`) if new packages added

## Infrastructure changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Bicep `what-if` reviewed before merging
- [ ] Parameter files updated for all environments (dev/staging/prod)
- [ ] Cost impact considered
